title: Adversarial Defense: Basic SQL Query
scenario: Write a SQL query to retrieve the last name, first name, and email from a user table. The query should be able to handle multiple rows of results. Consider the constraints of the user table and the desired output. The target LLM output should be a simple SQL query that can be executed.
constraints: Must use SELECT and FROM clauses

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the SQL query is syntactically correct and can be executed without errors.
Check if the query retrieves the required columns (last name, first name, and email).
Check if the query meets the length constraint and uses the required clauses.
